expectations.evidence: Line 56: `settings.acceptedDocuments = [DriverLicense(region: .us)]` — single entry, no rejectedDocuments list.

expectations.text: Calls settings.setIncludeImage(true, for: .croppedDocument) — required for frontReviewImage to be populated
expectations.evidence: Line 60: `settings.setIncludeImage(true, for: .croppedDocument)` with comment explaining it's required for frontReviewImage.

expectations.text: Does NOT use AamvaBarcodeVerifier or DataConsistencyVerifier — verification is settings-driven
expectations.evidence: No references to AamvaBarcodeVerifier or DataConsistencyVerifier anywhere in the file.

expectations.text: Handles .inconsistentData, .forgedAamvaBarcode, and .documentExpired in didReject with distinct messages
expectations.evidence: Lines 95–103: separate `case .inconsistentData`, `case .forgedAamvaBarcode`, and `case .documentExpired` branches each with unique message constants.

expectations.text: Uses idCapture.reset() when re-enabling capture after showing the verification result (or correctly re-enables isEnabled)
expectations.evidence: `idCapture.isEnabled = true` is called in the completion block of every presentResult call in both didCapture and didReject, correctly re-enabling capture after the user dismisses the alert.
